_comment: Stop ledger. cmd_set_stop writes here on every stop update. gate-check reads for risk-budget calc. Format per position: entry, current_stop, state (hard-cut|trailing), trail_pct (null in hard-cut), high_water_price, last_updated.
_stop_states: hard-cut: fixed -7% from entry. trailing: trail_pct% below high_water_price. Transition: hard-cut → trailing once return >= +7%.
